request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X GET "{{base_url}}/api/v1/health"
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name": "John Doe", "email": "john@example.com", "password": "Password123"}'
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/verify-email -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"token": "{{emailVerificationToken}}"}'
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/resend-verification -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email": "john@example.com"}'
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email": "john@example.com", "password": "Password123"}'
Generated from cURL: curl -X GET {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/me -H "Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}"
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/refresh-token -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"refreshToken": "{{refreshToken}}"}'
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/logout -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"refreshToken": "{{refreshToken}}"}'
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/forgot-password -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email": "john@example.com"}'
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/reset-password -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"token": "{{passwordResetToken}}", "newPassword": "NewPassword123"}'

Generated from cURL: curl -X PATCH {{base_url}}/api/v1/auth/change-password -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}" -d '{"currentPassword": "Password123", "newPassword": "NewPassword123"}'

request.description: Client endpoint to fetch the authenticated user's current subscription.

Client endpoint to fetch the authenticated user's current subscription.

- Only period-end cancel is supported now.
    
- It schedules cancellation (does not cut access immediately).
    
- User keeps access until expiry date.
